CandidateLineage.description: Identity and deterministic construction inputs for one candidate revision.
CandidateLineage.title: CandidateLineage

Clue.description: Presentation text and provenance links for compiled constraints.
Clue.title: Clue

DifficultyEvidence.description: Family-relative difficulty derived from a canonical human trace.
DifficultyEvidence.title: DifficultyEvidence

DisplaySpec.description: Family-neutral presentation semantics, separate from solver authority.
DisplaySpec.title: DisplaySpec

Domain.description: An immutable collection of values available to variables.
Domain.title: Domain

DomainValue.description: A labelled member of a puzzle domain.
DomainValue.title: DomainValue

GenerationLineageEvent.description: One ordered, immutable event in a generation attempt.
GenerationLineageEvent.title: GenerationLineageEvent

GenerationMode.description: Operational mode requested without changing correctness gates.
GenerationMode.title: GenerationMode

GenerationRequest.description: Versioned, deterministic intent supplied to a family generator adapter.
GenerationRequest.title: GenerationRequest

GenerationResult.description: Terminal result whose puzzle is playable only when fully accepted.
GenerationResult.title: GenerationResult

GenerationVerification.description: All deterministic evidence needed by the CR-007 acceptance gate.
GenerationVerification.title: GenerationVerification

NoveltyEvidence.description: Conservative duplicate decision with closest-match evidence.
NoveltyEvidence.title: NoveltyEvidence

ProvenanceBundle.description: Immutable provenance references attached to a puzzle revision.
ProvenanceBundle.title: ProvenanceBundle

ProvenanceReference.description: A source entity or producing activity supporting the specification.
ProvenanceReference.title: ProvenanceReference

PuzzleFingerprints.description: Stable exact, equivalence, solution, structure, trace, and visual digests.
PuzzleFingerprints.title: PuzzleFingerprints

PuzzleIdentity.description: Versioned identity and authorship for one immutable puzzle revision.
PuzzleIdentity.title: PuzzleIdentity

PuzzleSpec.description: Validated family-neutral contract for one complete puzzle revision.
PuzzleSpec.title: PuzzleSpec

QuarantineRecord.description: Fail-closed record for evidence that cannot authorize acceptance.
QuarantineRecord.title: QuarantineRecord

UniquenessEvidence.description: Backend-neutral result of enumerating at most two solutions.
UniquenessEvidence.title: UniquenessEvidence

Variable.description: A named unknown whose candidates come from one domain.
Variable.title: Variable
